products.name: Vanguard Wireless ANC Headphones
products.description: Immersive soundscapes with industry-leading hybrid active noise cancellation, high-fidelity audio drivers, and a luxurious 45-hour battery life.

products.name: Apex Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A minimalist 75% mechanical layout featuring hot-swappable tactile pre-lubed switches, double-shot PBT keycaps, and seamless dual-wireless connectivity.

products.name: Nomad Waxed Canvas Backpack
products.description: Weather-resistant, highly durable travel companion with a dedicated 16" padded laptop sleeve, magnetic Fidlock buckles, and full-access clamshell opening.

products.name: Horizon Smart Hybrid Watch
products.description: Elegant analogue watch aesthetics fused with modular fitness sensors, continuous heart rate tracking, smart alerts, and an ultra-low power E-Ink sub-dial.

products.name: Verdant Soy Scented Candle
products.description: Slow-burning, hand-poured soy candle infused with native sandalwood, amber, and light citrus, designed to establish a calming and productive mood.

products.name: Solis Designer Desk Lamp
products.description: Fully directional workspace illumination with warm-to-cool smart temperature tuning, stepless rotatable dimming, and an integrated wireless charger base.

products.name: Elysian Siphon Coffee Brewer
products.description: Perfect vacuum brewing apparatus creating a pristine cup of clean, fully rounded specialty coffee. Includes medical-grade borosilicate glass flasks.

products.name: Aero Dual-Driver Wireless Buds
products.description: Indestructibly built featherlight wireless buds with IPX7 waterproofing, dynamic deep-bass drivers, and comfortable custom-form earmolds for athletes.

products.name: Echelon Premium Water Flask
products.description: Double-walled vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle. Retains ice-cold drinks for 24 hours and hot coffee for 12 hours without external condensation.
